title: Crafty Cuisine - Vanilla Inspired Food
description: Adds food that makes vanilla food items more useful
body:
### So, uh, what does this mod add exactly?

Currently, this mod adds 32 new foods to the game (21 shown here).  Well, I say "new," but they're more or less built from the already existing foods.  No new crops or anything like that.

### why u make dis mod

I wanted to make other items in Minecraft more viable for making food so that there aren't just two or three de facto foods that players end up using.  
I generally go by three rules:
1.  Limit my base additions to vanilla items as much as possible.
2.  Give each and every food item a niche that remains beneficial no matter which stage of the game you're at.
3.  Try and fail to make my additions thematically appropriate.  Your mileage may vary with this one.
